# KG-Microbe merged KG — schema & data review

**Build reviewed:** `data/merged/20260610/` (`merged-kg_nodes.tsv`, `merged-kg_edges.tsv`)
**Profile:** 2,438,443 nodes · 12,900,316 edges
**Schema:** [`schema/kg_microbe_merged.yaml`](kg_microbe_merged.yaml) (generated by
`scripts/generate_merged_kg_schema.py`)
**Composition:** includes the `metatraits` + `metatraits_gtdb` transforms — their
`has_phenotype` and `METPO:*` edges dominate the edge volume.

> This build is the KG **with the extra metatraits transforms**. A merge config
> without them is smaller; the difference is graph composition, not deduplication.

## Verdict

The merged KG conforms structurally to the KGX node/edge model, and the schema
generated from it validates (`gen-linkml`) with a real 116-node / 100-edge
sample passing `linkml-validate`. The controlled-vocabulary columns are clean
and enumerable (`category`, `predicate`, `knowledge_level`, `agent_type`). The
main issues are in the **provenance** column and a handful of **encoding /
column-hygiene** problems — none block use, but several are worth normalizing
before release.

---

## 1. Node model

Columns: `id, category, name, description, xref, provided_by, synonym, deprecated, same_as`.

### Categories (22 distinct; `|`-multivalued on 18,380 nodes)

| Category | Nodes |
| --- | ---: |
| biolink:OrganismTaxon | 1,327,379 |
| biolink:Genome | 732,475 |
| biolink:ChemicalEntity | 219,469 |
| biolink:MolecularActivity | 95,103 |
| biolink:BiologicalProcess | 40,746 |
| biolink:Protein | 8,848 |
| biolink:OntologyClass | 7,933 |
| biolink:ChemicalMixture | 6,082 |
| biolink:CellularComponent | 4,586 |
| biolink:MacromolecularComplex | 4,265 |
| biolink:GrowthMedium | 3,351 |
| biolink:ComplexMolecularMixture | 2,693 |
| biolink:ChemicalRole | 1,410 |
| biolink:AnatomicalEntity | 597 |
| METPO:1001000 | 503 |
| biolink:Procedure | 503 |
| biolink:NamedThing | 398 |
| biolink:EnvironmentalFeature | 224 |
| biolink:PhenotypicQuality | 197 |
| biolink:TaxonomicRank | 51 |
| biolink:Food | 26 |
| biolink:EnvironmentalMaterial | 3 |

All but one (`METPO:1001000`) are Biolink categories. Common `|`-combinations:
`biolink:MolecularActivity|biolink:Protein` (8,848),
`biolink:BiologicalProcess|biolink:MolecularActivity` (5,116),
`biolink:ComplexMolecularMixture|biolink:GrowthMedium` (2,673),
`METPO:1001000|biolink:Procedure` (503).

### ID namespaces (≈35 CURIE prefixes)

| Prefix | Nodes | | Prefix | Nodes |
| --- | ---: | --- | --- | ---: |
| NCBITaxon | 889,256 | | mediadive.medium | 3,356 |
| GenBank | 732,475 | | METPO | 1,586 |
| kgmicrobe.strain | 252,184 | | UPA | 1,086 |
| CHEBI | 224,537 | | UBERON | 632 |
| GTDB | 186,242 | | kgmicrobe.assay | 503 |

| ENVO | 4,366 | | NCIT / RO / bacdive.isolation_source / OBO / kgmicrobe.* / MICRO / PO / TAXRANK / IAO | < 210 each |

---

## 2. Edge model

Columns: `subject, predicate, object, relation, primary_knowledge_source, knowledge_level, agent_type, has_percentage, unit, value`.

### Predicates (88 distinct)

Composition: **18 Biolink**, **67 METPO**, **3 OWL/RDF(S)**. Top predicates:

| Predicate | Edges |
| --- | ---: |
| biolink:subclass_of | 2,428,275 |
| biolink:has_phenotype | 1,742,331 |
| METPO:2000303 | 1,045,584 |
| METPO:2000038 | 761,369 |
| METPO:2000511 | 706,765 |
| METPO:2000302 | 534,580 |
| METPO:2000034 | 485,941 |
| biolink:location_of | 249,005 |
| biolink:close_match | 245,471 |
| biolink:capable_of | 122,803 |

The 3 non-Biolink/METPO predicates are raw ontology-structure axioms:
`rdfs:subPropertyOf` (241), `rdf:type` (46), `owl:inverseOf` (42).

`relation`: ~100 distinct CURIEs (RO/biolink) — left as a string range.

### `knowledge_level` (Biolink)

| Value | Edges |
| --- | ---: |
| observation | 10,167,623 |
| knowledge_assertion | 1,376,406 |
| *(empty)* | 1,165,394 |
| logical_entailment | 190,892 |
| knowledge_assertion\|knowledge_assertion | 1 |

### `agent_type` (Biolink)

| Value | Edges |
| --- | ---: |
| manual_agent | 5,858,614 |
| automated_agent | 5,652,179 |
| *(empty)* | 1,165,394 |
| manual_validation_of_automated_agent | 190,535 |
| automated_agent\|manual_agent | 33,593 |
| manual_agent\|manual_agent | 1 |

`knowledge_level` and `agent_type` are empty on the **same 1,165,394** edges.

### `unit` (measurement edges)

12,511,554 edges have no unit. Populated units: `Celsius` (155,808),
`%NaCl(w/v)` (121,844), `pH` (65,281), `g` (22,741), `ml` (11,993), `mm`,
`mg`, … plus mojibake variants (`ï¿½g`, `&mu;g`, `&#956;l`, `&#956;g`).

---

## 3. Provenance — `primary_knowledge_source`

**100,185 distinct values**, heterogeneous in form:

| Form | Distinct | Edges | Examples |
| --- | ---: | ---: | --- |
| Python-list strain literals | 100,159 | 5,957,094 | `['infores:bacdive', 'bacdive:100691']`, `['infores:metatraits', 'infores:gtdb-metatraits']` |
| `infores:` CURIEs | 16 | 5,339,506 | `infores:metatraits`, `infores:gtdb`, `infores:rhea` |
| Raw source filenames | 7 | 1,366,181 | `chebi.json`, `go.json`, `ec.json`, `ncbitaxon_removed_subset.json` |
| Bare names | 3 | 237,535 | `bacdive`, `mediadive`, `MediaDive` |

Only the `infores:` form is a clean knowledge-source identifier. The list
literals are a stringified Python list (multi-source provenance encoded as text),
and the filename / bare-name forms are unnormalized.

---

## 4. Data-quality findings

| # | Severity | Finding |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **High** | `primary_knowledge_source` is not normalized: ~1.37M edges use raw filenames (`chebi.json`, `go.json`, …), 237K use bare names (`bacdive`, `mediadive`, `MediaDive`), and ~5.96M use stringified Python lists. Only ~5.34M use clean `infores:` CURIEs. |
| 2 | Medium | 33,594 edges carry `\|`-joined `agent_type` (mostly `automated_agent\|manual_agent`) — the same edge contributed by two sources with differing agent types, joined by KGX merge. 1 such `knowledge_level` row. |
| 3 | Medium | 3 raw OWL/RDF(S) predicates (`rdfs:subPropertyOf`, `rdf:type`, `owl:inverseOf`; 329 edges) leaked into the KG — ontology-structure axioms rather than Biolink/METPO associations. |
| 4 | Low | `unit` encoding corruption (mojibake for µ): `ï¿½g`, `&mu;g`, `&#956;l`, `&#956;g`. |
| 5 | Low | `deprecated` node column holds malformed full-URI values (`http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UPa_…`) on a few UPA nodes instead of a boolean. |
| 6 | Info | 1,165,394 edges have empty `knowledge_level` **and** `agent_type` (same rows) — provenance metadata absent on that slice. |

---

## 5. Schema conformance

- `schema/kg_microbe_merged.yaml` validates with `gen-linkml`.
- A referentially-consistent 116-node / 100-edge sample drawn from the build
  (`schema/examples/kg_microbe_merged_sample.yaml`) passes `linkml-validate`.
- Enums (`NodeCategoryEnum` 22, `PredicateEnum` 88, `KnowledgeLevelEnum` 3,
  `AgentTypeEnum` 3) were populated from the build's own distinct values, so by
  construction every non-empty value of those columns is covered.

---

## 6. Recommendations

1. **Normalize `primary_knowledge_source` to `infores:` CURIEs.** Map
   `chebi.json -> infores:chebi`, `go.json -> infores:go`, `bacdive -> infores:bacdive`,
   etc., and replace the stringified-list strain provenance with a proper
   multivalued field (or a normalized single source + a separate strain qualifier).
2. **Resolve `|`-joined `agent_type`** (33.6K edges) with a precedence rule or a
   multivalued representation rather than a joined string.
3. **Decide whether OWL/RDF(S) predicates belong** in the merged Biolink KG; if
   not, filter `rdfs:subPropertyOf` / `rdf:type` / `owl:inverseOf` at merge time.
4. **Fix `unit` encoding** (emit UTF-8 `µ`), and **fix the `deprecated` column**
   population (boolean, not URI).
5. **Backfill `knowledge_level` / `agent_type`** on the 1.17M edges that lack
   both, where a defensible value exists.
6. Re-run `scripts/generate_merged_kg_schema.py` per build to keep the schema and
   this review in sync; enum drift (new categories/predicates) is then visible in
   the diff.
